name: Rosy Rhubarb Sherbet
recipeIngredient: Toasted coconut or nuts -- if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine rhubarb and 1 cup sugar, grated orange peel, orange juice, and corn syrup.
2. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat and cook until the rhubarb is tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Allow to cool.
5. Pour into loaf pan or freezer trays; freeze until slush consistency, about 1-2 hours.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 2 tablespoons sugar, beating continuously until stiff peaks form.
7. In a large bowl, stir partially frozen rhubarb mixture; beat until light and fluffy.
8. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
9. Return to freezer container; cover with plastic wrap to prevent crystals from forming.
10. Freeze until firm, about 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally.
11. Allow to soften slightly; spoon into sherbet glasses.
12. Garnish with toasted coconut or nuts.
